description: Third-party plugins to install via each platform's native plugin system

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: Official superpowers plugin - skills, parallel agents, brainstorming

codex.install_cmd: codex plugin marketplace add openai-curated && codex plugin enable superpowers@openai-curated

plugins.name: ecc
plugins.description: Everything Claude Code - agents, commands, language-specific rules

cursor.note: Agents distributed via earthchen-ai-assets plugin (agents/ directory)
